description: Integrate SSO via SAML 2.0 and OIDC for enterprise onboarding to facilitate seamless authentication and improve procurement processes.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the platform WHEN they attempt to log in via SSO THEN they should be able to authenticate using SAML 2.0 or OIDC.

description: Implement multi-tenant data isolation methods to meet SOC 2 Type II compliance requirements, moving beyond application-level row filtering.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a multi-tenant environment WHEN a security audit is conducted THEN data isolation must be verified at the schema or database level.

description: Develop a fine-grained RBAC system that allows for custom role definitions, permission inheritance, and resource-level access controls.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user with a custom role WHEN they access resources THEN they should only see resources they have permissions for.

description: Enable data residency controls to allow enterprise customers to choose where their data is stored, ensuring compliance with GDPR and local laws.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a customer selects a data residency option WHEN data is stored THEN it must be stored in the selected region.

description: Establish a structured mechanism for collecting customer feedback on feature usage and satisfaction to inform product improvements.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the feedback tool WHEN they submit feedback THEN it should be recorded and categorized for analysis.

story_title: Monitor and Alert on Uptime Metrics
description: Implement monitoring and alerting for uptime metrics to ensure high availability and customer satisfaction.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a monitoring tool is in place WHEN uptime drops below 99.9% THEN an alert should be triggered.

description: Run experiments to test various churn reduction strategies and measure their impact on customer retention.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a churn reduction strategy is implemented WHEN measuring churn rate THEN the rate should decrease by at least 10% over the next quarter.

description: Create an audit logging mechanism to track permission changes and access control modifications for compliance and security purposes.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a permission change occurs WHEN the change is made THEN it should be logged with user details and timestamp.

description: Allow enterprise customers to define custom roles with specific permissions tailored to their organizational needs.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN an admin creates a custom role WHEN they define permissions THEN the role should be saved and available for assignment.

description: Develop a system for permission inheritance that allows roles to inherit permissions from other roles, simplifying management.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a role inherits permissions from another role WHEN the parent role's permissions change THEN the child role's permissions should update accordingly.

description: Create a mechanism for users to provide feedback on their experience and feature requests directly through the platform.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the feedback form WHEN they submit feedback THEN it should be logged for review.

story_title: Implement White-Label Theming and Custom Domain Support
description: Develop white-label branding capabilities allowing enterprise customers to customize logos, color schemes, and domain names.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a customer configures white-label settings WHEN they access the platform THEN the branding should reflect their customizations.
dependencies: story-fine-grained-rbac, story-audit-logging, story-custom-role-definitions, story-permission-inheritance, story-data-residency, story-feedback-collection, story-user-feedback, story-uptime-monitoring, story-churn-experiments, story-data-residency-controls-for-eu-and-apac-regions

story_title: Data residency controls for EU and APAC regions
description: GDPR and data sovereignty requirements mean enterprise customers must choose where their data is stored. Need to implement region-pinned storage with cross-region replication disabled by default. Affects database, file storage, and search indices.
